title: Five killed in Lebanon as Israeli forces advance across Litani River — Al Jazeera
snippet: Al Jazeera reports 5 killed in Lebanon as IDF advances across the Litani River, corroborating Times of Israel reporting on Netanyahu's confirmation of 36th Division crossing near Zawtar al-Sharqiyah.
tag_reason: Same story as src-1480, Al Jazeera perspective with casualty count confirmation
